creator: ggcameron@gmail.com
text:
Current security/vscan port is for version 5.10e of virusscan. Current version on McAfee website is 6.0.

update_dat script in 5.10e fails as cannot find update.ini file at URL in the port.

gavin@earth : fetch -q http://download.nai.com/products/datfiles/4.x/nai/update.ini
fetch: http://download.nai.com/products/datfiles/4.x/nai/update.ini: Not Found
gavin@earth :

Port was last updated Jan 2009.
